title: The Create Extended
description: This modpack aims to extend the create mod, with it's additions and a wide varity of decoration and exploration mods.
body:
# Welcome to [The Create Extended]

A short summary of what this modpack is about. 
The focus of Create Extended is to extend the base experience of Create, many extensions of the Create mod are present but also exploration and decoration possibilities are given to elevate the game experience to a new level. In essence it is about having a relaxed experience, for this reason (TCE) does not include hardcore mods, on the contrary the modpack is designed to make the gameplay easier and still be challenging.

**So let's keep in mind that the modpack is about having a relaxed experience and being able to just start building and exploring.**

## What does [The Create Extended] include?

_All mods included should be vanilla friendly.*_

**Exploration:**
- All [YUNG's] mods
- Planes
- Cars
- Create Buildings
- Waystones
- Backpack
- Bountiful
- Waystones

**Building:**
- Lots of Furniture mods
- All [Let's Do] mods
- More Block Variants
- Connectible Chains
- Handcrafted
- Supplementaries
- Twigs
- Placeble Items
- Axiom (Creative Only)

**Quality of Life:**
- Carry On
- Better F3
- Zoomify
- Chunks Fade in
- Essential
- Elytra Slot
- Jade
- Falling Trees

And many more mods that Improve the gameplay.
